title: Designing MongoDB schema for e-commerce catalog
description: Built product catalog with embedded variants and reviews. Key decisions: embedded frequently-accessed data (variants, top reviews), referenced rarely-accessed data (full review history), used bucket pattern for time-series analytics. Added compound indexes on category+price for filtered searches.

title: Optimizing MongoDB aggregation pipeline performance
description: User's aggregation was slow on large collection. Optimized by: adding compound index matching $match stage, moving $match and $sort early in pipeline, using $project to reduce document size before $group, adding allowDiskUse for large sorts, and using $facet for parallel aggregations.

title: Implementing MongoDB Atlas Vector Search for RAG
description: Set up vector search for retrieval-augmented generation. Created vector index on embeddings field with cosine similarity. Used $vectorSearch in aggregation pipeline with numCandidates 10x limit for accuracy. Combined with $match for metadata filtering and $project to exclude embedding from results.

title: Building real-time sync with MongoDB Change Streams
description: Implemented real-time updates using change streams. Key patterns: used resume tokens for fault tolerance, filtered changes with $match pipeline, handled invalidate events for collection drops. Added exponential backoff reconnection and processed changes idempotently using document _id.

title: MongoDB transaction patterns for order processing
description: Implemented multi-document transactions for order workflow. Used session.withTransaction() for automatic retry, kept transactions short by pre-validating data, handled TransientTransactionError and UnknownTransactionCommitResult. Designed documents to minimize cross-shard transactions.

title: Setting up MongoDB Atlas Search for full-text queries
description: Configured Atlas Search for product search with autocomplete. Created custom analyzers for multi-language support, used compound queries combining must/should/filter clauses, implemented fuzzy matching for typo tolerance, and added highlighting for search result snippets.

title: Building FastAPI backend with MongoDB and authentication
description: Created REST API with JWT auth flow. Used motor for async MongoDB operations, implemented refresh token rotation stored in MongoDB, added rate limiting using MongoDB TTL indexes, created middleware for request logging. Structured project with routers, services, and repository layers.

title: Deploying full-stack app with React and MongoDB Atlas
description: End-to-end deployment of MERN-style app. Frontend on Vercel with environment-based API URLs, backend on Railway with MongoDB Atlas connection. Configured CORS properly, set up Atlas Network Access for cloud IPs, implemented health checks, and added connection pooling with maxPoolSize.

title: Building event-driven microservices with MongoDB
description: Designed event-driven architecture using MongoDB as event store. Used change streams to publish domain events, implemented outbox pattern for reliable event publishing, created separate read models updated via change streams. Added dead letter collection for failed event processing.

title: Implementing user activity analytics pipeline
description: Built analytics pipeline from raw events to dashboards. Used MongoDB time-series collections for event ingestion, created hourly/daily aggregations with scheduled triggers, implemented materialized views pattern for dashboard queries. Added TTL indexes for automatic data retention.

title: Creating multi-tenant SaaS application with MongoDB
description: Designed multi-tenant architecture with tenant isolation. Used tenant_id field in all collections with compound indexes, implemented row-level security in application layer, created tenant-aware connection middleware. Added tenant usage tracking and implemented tenant data export feature.

title: Building AI chatbot with conversation memory in MongoDB
description: Implemented chatbot with persistent memory using MongoDB. Stored conversations with session_id and TTL for cleanup, implemented sliding window context retrieval, added vector search for relevant past conversations. Used aggregation to format chat history for LLM context.
